title: AI-Assisted Development
description: Prompting for better code, reviewing AI output
longDescription: AI coding tools are transforming how software gets built. Whether you're using ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, or Cursor, knowing how to work WITH AI makes you dramatically more productive -- and knowing when NOT to trust it keeps you out of trouble. This course teaches you the real skills behind vibe coding: crafting prompts that produce working code, understanding what AI can and can't do, spotting subtle bugs in AI-generated output, and building workflows that combine your creativity with AI's speed. You'll learn why context matters, how to break problems into AI-friendly pieces, and what to always verify before shipping AI-written code to production.
